projectDescription: A curated list of project-based programming tutorials where developers learn by building real applications from scratch, organized by programming language.
keyFeatures: Curated project-based tutorials spanning 20+ programming languages
Tutorials covering systems programming, web development, ML/AI, mobile, and game development
Multi-part tutorial series for deep dives into complex projects
271,000+ GitHub stars indicating broad community trust
Organized by language and technology category for easy navigation
publicApiSurface: C/C++ tutorials: compilers, OS, emulators, graphics, networking
Python tutorials: web apps (Flask/Django), ML, computer vision (OpenCV), bots, data science
JavaScript tutorials: React, Angular, Vue, Node.js, D3.js, game development
Go tutorials: web apps, blockchain, chat systems, microservices
Rust tutorials: OS, browser engine, WebAssembly, game development
Ruby tutorials: Rails apps, Redis clone, network stack
Java tutorials: interpreters, HTTP servers, Android apps
Swift tutorials: iOS projects, retro game engine
Dart/Flutter tutorials: mobile app clones (Instagram, TikTok, WhatsApp)
PHP tutorials: Laravel apps, CMS, social networks
C# tutorials: RPG games, Xamarin apps
Lua tutorials: LÖVE game engine projects
R tutorials: Shiny web apps, data science projects
Elixir/Erlang tutorials: chat applications, distributed systems
Additional resources: online learning platforms, communities
